title: Caliban's War
author: James S.A. Corey
note: The second entry in Sci-Fi writing duo James S.A. Corey's series, the Expanse.

title: The Sun Also Rises
author: Ernest Hemingway
note: Hemingway's debut novel and the origin of the (in)famous Iceberg Theory. A glimpse into post World War I Europe through the eyes of expat journalist Jake Barnes.

title: Central Banking 101
author: Joeseph Wang
note: Former FRBNY Open Markets Desk Trader Joeseph Wang offers a mental model to understand the dollar and its role in modern markets.

title: Leviathan Wakes
author: James S.A. Corey
note: The first book in the Expanse series. Space opera meets noir detective fiction.
